title: Create update / notification with the Application's name instead of User

posts.author: lanyere (Yerlan)
posts.cookedHtml:
When the mutation create_update and create_notification is used, the name is User’s name.

mutation {
  create_notification(body: "Update body" item_id: 123) {
    id
  }
}

Example:

image1094×259 23.5 KB

As you can see, the notification / update is created by Yerlan (token’s owner, that was used to send that request).

The idea is to be able to use flag to show application’s name, instead of User.

Example:

mutation {
  create_update(body: "Update body" item_id: 123 from_app: true) {
    id
  }
}

image1387×382 18.1 KB

This way, the users will be able to understand what exact application is sending the notification or update.
